user.title: Zigbee Lock Manager
user.description: Select the lock entity you want to manage and configure its PIN slot settings.

data_description.slot_count: How many PIN code slots to create (1–100).
data_description.lock_profile: Choose the profile that matches your lock model for best compatibility. For ID Lock 202 Multi use: Add unit by inserting module in Remote Control slot (with batteries removed) and start Add unit on hub. Remove: [Master PIN] * 9 * 0. Manual sync: [Master PIN] * 9 * 1.
data_description.enable_notifications: When enabled, automation events create persistent notifications.
data_description.enable_presence_automation: Create automations that toggle selected slots based on occupancy.
data_description.activity_event_count: How many recent audit events to show in the dashboard timeline (3–10).
data_description.enable_id_lock_advanced_controls: Opt-in. Creates controls for lock_mode, relock_enabled, audio_volume, rfid_enabled, and master_pin_mode via ZHA manufacturer attributes.
data_description.battery_low_threshold: Low battery threshold (5–100%) used by ID Lock battery alert automation.

error.no_locks: No lock entities were found. Please pair your Zigbee lock with Home Assistant before adding this integration.
error.invalid_lock_name: The lock entity ID contains invalid characters. Only lowercase letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens are allowed.

abort.no_locks: No lock entities found. Please pair a Zigbee lock with Home Assistant first, then add this integration again.

init.title: Zigbee Lock Manager Options
init.description: Update PIN slot count and lock profile settings.
